title: Visit Phoenix Destination Brochure (English)
expected_content_elements: Cover with slogan and hero imagery
Featured attractions with headings and short descriptions
Embedded map of Greater Phoenix with labels
Call-to-action and practical information (websites, apps, planning tools)
key_details: Highlights Phoenix as an innovative, diverse desert city blending Indigenous roots and modern experiences.
Lists multiple must-see attractions (museums, gardens, family venues, outdoor attractions).
Includes a map and planning resources (trip planner, app, contact information).
layout_features: Highly visual layout with text overlaid on images and multi-column sections.
Short paragraphs and lists under bolded attraction names.
images_and_diagrams_description: Rich photography of landscapes, cityscapes, and attractions; a detailed tourist map with numbered locations.
tables_description: No formal data tables; at most, simple lists.
extraction_checklist: Is the main welcome paragraph extracted in correct order (despite multi-column or overlaid layout)?
Are attraction names clearly separated as headings from their descriptions?
Does the extractor avoid interleaving map labels with body text?
Are special characters/ligatures normalized so words are not broken (e.g., “fi” ligatures)?
Are URLs or contact details, if present, captured clearly?
